---
title: "Demand estimation first stage"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8)
```


```{css, echo = FALSE}

table, td, th {
  border: none;
  padding-left: 1em;
  padding-right: 1em;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  margin-top: 1em;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
}

```



### Residual price variation

- Regress log of wage and fee on covariates and fixed effects, and then take residuals.
- The residuals are demeaned.

#### Firm FE

```{r}
htmltools::includeHTML(here::here("figuretable/price_variation/wage_and_fee_table_firm_FE.html"))
```

#### Establishment FE

```{r}
htmltools::includeHTML(here::here("figuretable/price_variation/wage_and_fee_table_establishment_FE.html"))
```


### Correlation between residual wages and fees

- Regress log of wage and fee on covariates and fixed effects, and then take residuals.
- The residuals are demeaned.

#### Firm FE

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/price_variation/wage_fee_correlation_firmFE.png"))
```

#### Establishment FE

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/price_variation/wage_fee_correlation_establishmentFE.png"))
```


### First stage of reduced-form demand estimation {.tabset}



#### Distance IV

```{r}
htmltools::includeHTML(here::here("figuretable/demand_estimation_reduced_form/first_stage_distance_IV.html"))
```



#### Number of rivals 

```{r}
htmltools::includeHTML(here::here("figuretable/demand_estimation_reduced_form/first_stage_num_rivals_IV.html"))
```



#### Hausman IV

```{r}
htmltools::includeHTML(here::here("figuretable/demand_estimation_reduced_form/first_stage_hausman_IV.html"))
```
